mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, email AS email, password AS password, name AS name, phone AS phone, CASE role WHEN 0 THEN 'CUSTOMER' WHEN 1 THEN 'HOTEL_MANAGER' WHEN 2 THEN 'ADMIN' WHEN 3 THEN 'SUPER_ADMIN' END AS role, CASE status WHEN 0 THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN 1 THEN 'DORMANT' WHEN 2 THEN 'LOCKED' WHEN 3 THEN 'WITHDRAW' END AS status, CASE membership WHEN 0 THEN 'NEW_MEMBER' WHEN 1 THEN 'STANDARD' WHEN 2 THEN 'GOLD' WHEN 3 THEN 'VIP' WHEN 4 THEN 'VVIP' END AS membership, marketing_agreed AS marketingAgreed, point AS point, created_at AS createdAt, modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT booking_id AS bookingId, booking_no AS bookingNo, guest_name AS guestName, CASE nationality WHEN 0 THEN 'OTHER' WHEN 1 THEN 'KOREA' WHEN 2 THEN 'US' WHEN 3 THEN 'CHINA' WHEN 4 THEN 'JAPAN' WHEN 5 THEN 'TAIWAN' WHEN 6 THEN 'HONG_KONG' WHEN 7 THEN 'PHILIPPINES' WHEN 8 THEN 'VIETNAM' WHEN 9 THEN 'SINGAPORE' END AS nationality, guest_phone AS guestPhone, guest_email AS guestEmail, special_request AS specialRequest, nights AS nights, adult_count AS adultCount, child_count AS childCount, checkin_date AS checkinDate, checkout_date AS checkoutDate, checkin_time AS checkinTime, checkout_time AS checkoutTime, cancelled_at AS cancelledAt, user_id AS userId, room_id AS roomId FROM bookings WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT room_id AS roomId, name AS name, number AS number, floor AS floor, size AS size, base_price AS basePrice, max_adult AS maxAdult, max_child AS maxChild, is_active AS isActive, CASE room_type WHEN 0 THEN 'Standard' WHEN 1 THEN 'Suite' WHEN 2 THEN 'Deluxe' END AS roomType, CASE room_status WHEN 0 THEN 'EnableReservation' WHEN 1 THEN 'DisableReservation' END AS roomStatus, CASE room_view_option WHEN 0 THEN 'CityView' WHEN 1 THEN 'RiverView' WHEN 2 THEN 'MountainView' WHEN 3 THEN 'OceanView' END AS roomViewOption, CASE room_bed_option WHEN 0 THEN 'Floor' WHEN 1 THEN 'DoubleBed' WHEN 2 THEN 'QueenBed' END AS roomBedOption, hotel_id AS hotelId block_start_date AS blockStartDate, block_end_date AS blockEndDate FROM rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT room_images.room_image_id AS roomImageId, room_images.file_name AS fileName, room_images.size AS size, room_images.ext AS ext, room_images.store_name AS storeName, room_images.path AS path, room_images.room_id AS roomId FROM room_images INNER JOIN rooms ON room_images.room_id = rooms.room_id WHERE rooms.room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT hotel_id AS hotelId, name AS name, description AS description, address AS address, city AS city, zip_code AS zipCode, phone AS phone, email AS email, check_in AS checkIn, check_out AS checkOut, star_rate AS starRate, is_active AS isActive, latitude AS latitude, longitude AS longitude, CASE type WHEN 0 THEN 'HOTEL' WHEN 1 THEN 'RESORT' WHEN 2 THEN 'PENSION_GUESTHOUSE' END AS type, created_at AS createdAt, modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM hotels WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId}

SELECT hotels.hotel_id AS hotelId, hotels.name AS name, hotels.description AS description, hotels.address AS address, hotels.city AS city, hotels.zip_code AS zipCode, hotels.phone AS phone, hotels.email AS email, hotels.check_in AS checkIn, hotels.check_out AS checkOut, hotels.star_rate AS starRate, hotels.is_active AS isActive, hotels.latitude AS latitude, hotels.longitude AS longitude, CASE hotels.type WHEN 0 THEN 'HOTEL' WHEN 1 THEN 'RESORT' WHEN 2 THEN 'PENSION_GUESTHOUSE' END AS type, hotels.created_at AS createdAt, hotels.modified_at AS modifiedAt FROM hotels INNER JOIN rooms ON hotels.hotel_id = rooms.hotel_id WHERE rooms.room_id = #{roomId}

SELECT hotel_images.image_id AS hotelImageId, hotel_images.file_name AS fileName, hotel_images.size AS size, hotel_images.ext AS ext, hotel_images.store_name AS storeName, hotel_images.path AS path, hotel_images.hotel_id AS hotelId FROM hotel_images INNER JOIN hotels ON hotel_images.hotel_id = hotels.hotel_id WHERE hotels.hotel_id = #{hotelId}
